_source: U.S. Dept. of Health & Human Services, ASPE — 2026 Poverty Guidelines, 48 Contiguous States. https://aspe.hhs.gov/topics/poverty-economic-mobility/poverty-guidelines
_note: Annual figures at 100% FPL by household size. Percent-of-FPL for any household size/income is computed by the engine, not stored per-program.
